notes: Rough generated samples for art direction review. Only the pizza jetpack opener is currently wired into story markdown.

samples.promptSummary: Nutty, Mama, and Papa testing soda-bottle jetpacks for pizza delivery in a cozy tree-town workshop.
Dust Calloway and Bishop watching a gold stagecoach float above Cinder Flats.
Nell at a Lost Things Rescue Service table in the Marigold Apartments lobby.
Ember discovering that her bubbles can carry whispered words in a cave classroom.
Mira discovering that a delivery drone will not leave after dropping off her running shoes.
